text: Bloc arms to Middle East: The USSR has continued to negotiate arms deliveries to the Middle East in recent months. It is providing for additional arms shipments to Yemen and is considering an Egyptian request for additional military transport aircraft. Arms are still being provided Syria under the credit granted in late 1957, although the Syrian agent in Moscow is now subordinate to the Egyptian arms purchasing mission

text: Nasir - Saudi Arabia: Cairo and Damascus continue to elaborate on their charges of King Saud’s plot against the UAR and Nasir’s life. King Saud has offered to meet Nasir either in Riyadh or Cairo and to confront Syrian Interior Minister Sarraj in order to refute his charges. Egypt has ordered "all subjects of the United Arab Republic" working in Saudi Arabia to leave as soon as possible after 8 March. An Egyptian campaign to split Saud’s ranks by portraying Saud as having sold out to the US against the advice of Saudi Crown Prince Faysal is being carried on in the press
